ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the student's account */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student is enrolled in */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the academic term */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent */,
  "parent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student's parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the teacher's account */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the teacher is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "assignment_description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score possible for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the performance record belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the performance record belongs to */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of days the student attended class */,
  "prestudy_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the pre-study assessment */,
  "homework_score" REAL /* Score obtained in homework assignments */,
  "midterm_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the mid-term exam */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the final exam */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score combining all assessments */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received by the student */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the academic term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
